features.name: firrtl extmodule with defname
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL extmodule declaration with defname property pointing to an external module implementation

features.name: blackbox path annotation referencing external module
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL BlackBoxPath annotation that maps an extmodule to an external Verilog file path

features.name: duplicate external module definitions with same output filename
features.description: Code should include multiple extmodule declarations where different annotations reference Verilog files that produce identical output filenames, triggering symbol redefinition
features.snippet:
extmodule Bar :
  defname = Bar

 extmodule Baz :
  defname = Baz

; annotations pointing Bar->file-A/Bar.sv and Baz->file-B/Bar.sv

features.name: empty systemverilog module for blackbox
features.description: Code should include an empty SystemVerilog module declaration used as a blackbox placeholder for external hardware
